Off Calendar May-07-2013 Continued To May-21-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1625 Quintara Street, San Francisco, Ca 94116-1233)
Off Calendar Aug-08-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jason Louie for and with Carlos Yap (Petitioner). Mark Watson for Alexandra Padilla De Zorita (Objector).

Mr. Watson reported that they have reached a stipulation to the sale of the property so long as the proceeds from the sale are put into a protected account. Written stipulation presented in open court. The sale was confirmed at $667,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale and alteration of one of terms to credit the purchaser up to $5,000.00 for purchase expenses. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $6,000.00 is required.

After the conclusion of the sale, this case was recalled per Mr. Louie's request. He addressed the additional bond issue and stated additional bond will not be necessary. The Court will review the additional bond issue.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1625 Quintara Street, San Francisco, Ca 94116-1233)
Off Calendar Jun-04-2012 Continued To Aug-06-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jason Louie for Carlos Yap. Mark Watson for Alexandra Padilla De Zorita (Heir).

The Court stated that the Report of Sale was not signed by the Administrator, that the Attorney can not sign the petition when the Client is a Fiduciary, and that Counsel needs to get signatures and provide notice. The Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property was continued to August 6, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for verification and notice.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
